privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our application.
privacy.section1.title: Information We Collect
privacy.section1.body: We may collect the following types of information:
privacy.section1.item1: Device information (device type, operating system version)
privacy.section1.item2: Usage data (game progress, session duration) stored locally on your device
privacy.section1.item3: Advertising identifiers for ad personalization (via Google AdMob)
privacy.section2.title: How We Use Your Information
privacy.section2.body: We use the collected information to:
privacy.section2.item1: Provide and improve the application experience
privacy.section2.item2: Display relevant advertisements through Google AdMob
privacy.section2.item3: Analyze usage patterns to improve app performance
privacy.section3.title: Third-Party Services
privacy.section3.body: Our app uses the following third-party services that may collect data:
privacy.section3.admob: Google AdMob — for displaying advertisements. AdMob may collect and use data as described in Google's Privacy Policy.
privacy.section4.title: Data Retention
privacy.section4.body: Game progress and settings are stored locally on your device and are deleted when you uninstall the app. We do not retain your data on our servers.
privacy.section5.title: Children's Privacy
privacy.section5.body: Our application is not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.section6.title: Your Rights
privacy.section6.body: You have the right to opt out of personalized advertising through your device settings. On iOS, go to Settings > Privacy & Security > Tracking. On Android, go to Settings > Google > Ads.
privacy.section7.title: Contact Us
privacy.section7.body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at:
support.title: Support
support.subtitle: How can we help you?
support.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
support.faq.q1: How do I save my progress?
support.faq.a1: Your progress is saved automatically as you play. No manual saving is required.
support.faq.q2: The game is not loading. What should I do?
support.faq.a2: Try closing and reopening the app. If the problem persists, try reinstalling the app. Your progress is saved to your device.
support.faq.a3: Currently the game is free to play and supported by ads. We appreciate your support!
support.contact.title: Still need help?
support.contact.body: Send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
